title: Canonical Format: Display Tag
description: Third-party-served display tag (JS, iframe, or 1×1 redirect). The buyer's adserver hosts the creative; the seller calls the tag URL at impression time. Slot: `tag_url` (url asset with appropriate `url_type`). Tracking model: opaque to seller — third party serves and measures. Click tracking via redirect URL substitution using universal_macros. Distinct from `image` (static asset hosted by seller) and `html5` (zip bundle hosted by seller).

slots.description: Default slots for display_tag canonical. Buyer ships a URL pointing at the third-party-served creative (JS, iframe, or 1×1 redirect) plus an optional backup image. Click and impression macros are substituted into the tag URL by the seller using `universal_macros`.

width.description: Required tag rendering width in pixels — use for fixed-size slots. For multi-size flexible slots use `sizes[]`; for responsive use `min_width`/`max_width`/`min_height`/`max_height`. Exactly one of `(width, height)`, `sizes[]`, or `min/max_width` + `min/max_height` ranges MUST be set.

height.description: Required tag rendering height in pixels. See `width` for size-mode mutual exclusion.

sizes.description: List of accepted (width, height) pairs for a multi-size flexible slot. The buyer's third-party tag must render at one of the listed sizes; the seller picks which size to request at impression time. Mutually exclusive with `(width, height)` and with responsive ranges.

min_width.description: Minimum accepted width for responsive third-party tags. Pair with `max_width`. Mutually exclusive with `(width, height)` and `sizes[]`.

max_width.description: Maximum accepted width for responsive third-party tags. Pair with `min_width`.

min_height.description: Minimum accepted height for responsive third-party tags. Pair with `max_height`.

max_height.description: Maximum accepted height for responsive third-party tags. Pair with `min_height`.

ssl_required.description: Whether the tag URL must be HTTPS.

max_response_time_ms.description: Maximum tag-server response time in milliseconds.

backup_image_required.description: Whether a backup image must accompany the tag for environments that cannot render the third-party tag.

om_sdk_required.description: Whether the buyer's tag must integrate IAB Open Measurement SDK for viewability.
